description: NVIDIA scenario parameters for report-generator.py charts. Probabilities set BEFORE price calculation to prevent anchoring bias.
methodology: Probability-weighted expected value. Scenarios calibrated to Q1 FY2027 guidance ($78B), competitive dynamics (AMD MI450, custom ASICs), and hyperscaler capex trajectory.

scenarios.name: Bull
scenarios.description: AI infrastructure supercycle sustains; Blackwell > consensus; new application waves (autonomous vehicles, robotics, sovereign AI) open $1T TAM; CUDA moat holds >10 years; gross margins expand to 76%
key_assumptions: FY2027 revenue +45% (in line with guided Q1 run-rate sustained)
AMD fails to exceed 15% GPU market share
Custom ASICs grow but NVDA TAM expands faster
Gross margin expands 1pp per year through FY2029

scenarios.name: Base
scenarios.description: Deceleration from hypergrowth to sustained structural growth; some market share erosion to AMD and ASICs; gross margins stable at 74%; CUDA moat durable but edge cases erode
key_assumptions: FY2027 revenue +45% consistent with guidance trajectory
AMD captures 5-8pp GPU market share by FY2029
Custom ASICs take 15-20% of incremental workloads
H20 China restrictions continue; no new restrictions
Gross margins flat at 74%; ASIC pricing pressure offset by mix

scenarios.name: Bear
scenarios.description: Capex digestion cycle pauses hyperscaler orders; AMD executes strongly; ASIC displacement accelerates; China restrictions escalate; revenue growth stalls then recovers slowly
key_assumptions: AMD captures 15-20pp GPU market share by FY2029
China export escalation removes ~$30B addressable market
Gross margins fall to 68% from pricing + mix pressure
FY2029 revenue contracts 5% as cycle peaks

risk_calibration.upside_catalyst: GTC 2026 Vera Rubin architecture adoption; agentic AI compute scaling laws; physical AI (robotics) workloads
risk_calibration.downside_catalyst: Hyperscaler capex pause; AMD MI450 benchmarks above B200; incremental China export controls
risk_calibration.key_unresolved_risk: Custom ASIC displacement rate — depends on software ecosystem lock-in durability (CUDA moat half-life)
risk_calibration.cross_stock_note: AMD research (2026-03-09) flagged OpenAI 6GW and Meta 6GW AMD commitments — suggests base case share erosion thesis has high-credibility evidence

data_sources.revenue_anchor: NVIDIA Q4 FY2026 earnings release + Q1 FY2027 guidance (Tier 1)
data_sources.margins: NVIDIA actual FY2026 financials + Q1 FY2027 guidance (Tier 1)
data_sources.competitive_dynamics: Cross-stock AMD note (2026-03-09, HIGH priority) + market data (Tier 2)
